title: 中央公积金 / Central Provident Fund (CPF)
summary: CPF 分 OA/SA/MA 账户,55 岁创建 RA;分别对应住房退休、退休、医疗;部分可经 CPF-IS 投资(有风险)。 / CPF has OA/SA/MA accounts and an RA created at 55, for housing/retirement, retirement and healthcare respectively; some balances may be invested via CPF-IS (which carries risk).

sections.heading: 账户与用途
sections.body: OA:住房/投资;SA:退休;MA(MediSave):医疗与医疗保险;55 岁创建 RA,SA(及需要时 OA)拨入形成退休储备。

sections.heading: Accounts & uses
sections.body: OA: housing/investment; SA: retirement; MA (MediSave): healthcare and medical insurance; at 55 an RA is created, funded from SA (and OA if needed).

sections.heading: CPF-IS
sections.body: OA/SA 超门槛部分可投资经核准产品,但投资有风险,可能低于 CPF 利息。

sections.heading: CPF-IS
sections.body: OA/SA above thresholds may be invested in approved products via CPF-IS, but investments carry risk and may underperform CPF interest.

keyPoints: OA/SA/MA + 55 岁 RA / OA/SA/MA + RA at 55
MediSave 用于医疗 / MediSave for healthcare
CPF-IS 投资有风险 / CPF-IS investments carry risk
